question: What are the top stop locations for the East Region fleet in the last 30 days?
reasoning: Fremont Warehouse leads with 198 visits and the highest dwell time at 72 min — loading dock queuing is the root cause; Andersen (e3) accounts for a disproportionate share of idle minutes here. Hayward Logistics (163 visits) is the secondary hub serving e2 and e4 daily. Dublin Distribution at 31 min avg dwell is the fastest-turnaround stop in the region, ideal for consolidation. Livermore Park's 57 min avg dwell on just 33 visits suggests delivery complexity at the site — worth investigating for route optimisation.
